channel.title: Opportunities at CEDIS on CEDIS
channel.description: Archive of calls, opportunities, and selection notices related to CEDIS activities and projects; all currently listed items are closed.

item.title: Voluntary call for cedis activities student registration 2025
item.description: Call for students interested in volunteering in CEDIS projects, research, and academic activities.

item.title: Call n. 01 2024 scholarship selection for gamification project
item.description: Scholarship selection linked to a gamification project.

item.title: Call n. 01 2023 scholarship selection for gamification project
item.description: Scholarship selection linked to a gamification project.
